chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1340 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.850/2024 (C/A) 29.05.2024 M/s Farhan Ali Shaikh and Ateeq-ur-Rehman, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Niazuddin N. Memon, Advocate for respondents No.2 & 3. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
